1. SURVIVE - HP is 100%, no issue
2. RESPAWN - Not dead
3. UNSTICK - Not stuck
4. BAIL OUT - No failed attempts
5. TURN IN - No active quests
6. EQUIP - Already have Bronze Axe equipped
7. LOOT - No items nearby
8. ADVANCE - No active quest
9. SEEK QUEST - No active quest, should navigate to quest NPC
10. ACCEPT - No quest NPC nearby (quest_npc_near: false)
11. PREPARE - Need to start a quest
12. EXPLORE
